broadlawns.org: Broadlawns Medical Center (Polk County public hospital; no 990 — governmental)
broadlawns.reconciliation_note: RESOLVED (mostly): audit 'Total DSH Payments Received' (p.7 col R) is $7.17M SPRY2017 / $6.50M SPRY2021, versus $8.56M/yr in the FY20-22 agreement per Broadlawns' financial statements — same order, plausibly gross-vs-net/timing. The earlier ~$3.2M figure was the FFS-rate-payments column, mislabeled. See column_correction_note.

dsh_schedule_caveat: Hospital names are as-extracted; multi-line names truncate (e.g. "Clinics" = University of Iowa Hospitals and Clinics). Sources: Iowa Auditor of State DSH examinations, SPRY 2017 (doc 1208822) and SPRY 2021 (doc 1518523), legis.iowa.gov.

column_correction_note: 2026-07-22: earlier extraction mislabeled schedule columns (F=FFS was called 'dsh_payments', G=MCO called 'ffs', H=Supplemental called 'mco'). dsh_examinations_corrected carries verified values incl. p.7 columns: true 'Total DSH Payments Received' is Broadlawns $7,172,342 (2017) / $6,495,102 (2021) — close to the $8.56M/yr agreements (gross vs received difference remains, but no order-of-magnitude mystery — and UIHC DSH received ROSE $29.0M -> $64.8M; the earlier '$33.3M -> $1.5M collapse' framing was a column-shift artifact and is retracted.

adair_seed.org: Adair County Health System (county hospital, Iowa Code ch. 347; 609 SE Kent St, Greenfield)
audit_trail: Annual audited financial statements filed with the Iowa Auditor of State (auditor.iowa.gov report database, searchable by entity name) — these carry payer mix, net patient revenue, the LTC/swing-bed unit, and county tax support
Adair County government annual audit (same database) — county-side flows
Federal Audit Clearinghouse single audits — likely present 2020-22 via HHS Provider Relief Fund (93.498); the fetcher now searches both the county and the hospital by auditee name
adair_seed.hypothesis: Adair's statewide-highest per-eligible Medicaid ($1,577/mo across ~1,558 eligibles) is consistent with a facility-mix signature: the county health system's LTC operation over a tiny eligible base. CONFIRM via (a) the hospital's audited payer-mix note, and (b) the facility-level vendor dataset once located on the Data Hub — do not narrate before either.
